nasb.text: At the end of three months we set sail on an Alexandrian ship which had wintered at the island, and which had the Twin Brothers for its figurehead.

esv.text: After three months we set sail in a ship that had wintered in the island, a ship of Alexandria, with the twin gods as a figurehead.

cnv.text: 過了三個月，我們上了一艘亞歷山太來的船。這船在島上過冬，船的名字是“宙斯雙子”。

ccb.text: 三个月后，我们搭乘一艘停在该岛过冬的船离开。这船叫“双神号”，来自亚历山大。

csbs.text: 过了三个月，我们上了一条亚历山大的船起航。这船是在那海岛过冬的，以“宙斯双子神”为船头雕像。
